title: jlearn：J语言机器学习库
title_en: jlearn: Machine Learning Library in J
summary: jlearn 是一个用 J 语言实现的机器学习库，提供了多种常见的机器学习算法和工具。该项目旨在将机器学习能力引入 J 语言生态，适合在 J 环境中进行数据分析和模型训练。jlearn is a machine learning library implemented in the J programming language, offering various common ML algorithms and tools, aiming to bring ML capabilities to the J ecosystem for data analysis and model training.
